data.title: 国际服签到活动「Schale's Hot Springs Materials Daily Supply」
data.summary: [Schale's Hot Springs Materials Daily Supply] Schale's Daily supplies will be sent from 03:00 AM (UT
data.body:
[Schale's Hot Springs Materials Daily Supply]

Schale's Daily supplies will be sent from 03:00 AM (UTC) everyday.
Don’t forget to check your mailbox daily!

🗓️Period: 6/29(Wed) ~ 7/11(Mon) (UTC)
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/99431
